local_writing_workflow.description: Explicit draft, revise, and summarize workflows execute through the accepted canonical local conversation path while supplied writing material remains data-only untrusted content.
limitations: Synthetic CI uses an injected Ollama transport and is not real local-runtime evidence.
The real-machine drill uses deterministic non-private writing requests and source material with one explicitly selected already-installed local Ollama model.
The report omits model names, request text, source text, prompt text, response text, paths, usernames, hostnames, credentials, and secret values.

Automatic or semantic retrieval, memory and project context, translation, attachments, multimodal input, streaming workflow output, tools, cloud fallback, and target-specific export remain outside this acceptance.
The complete Phase 6 gate and stable general anti-lock-in remain incomplete.
